Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Xkcd thing, now interactive 907 upvotes, 127 comments
  2. Simplifying Application Architecture with Modular Design and MIM 19 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Physics Girl: Super-Kamiokande – Imaging the sun by detecting neutrinos [video] 271 upvotes, 41 comments
  4. Show HN: Open-Source Article 12 Logging Infrastructure for the EU AI Act 16 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Simple screw counter 245 upvotes, 66 comments
  6. TorchLean: Formalizing Neural Networks in Lean 26 upvotes, 3 comments
  7. Launch HN: Cekura (YC F24) – Testing and monitoring for voice and chat AI agents 41 upvotes, 8 comments
  8. Intel's make-or-break 18A process node debuts for data center with 288-core Xeon 47 upvotes, 10 comments
  9. Points on a ring: An interactive walkthrough of a popular math problem 29 upvotes, 5 comments
  10. Show HN: Effective Git 13 upvotes, 1 comments
  11. Disable Your SSH access accidentally with scp 56 upvotes, 17 comments
  12. Show HN: Explain Curl Commands 7 upvotes, 0 comments
  13. GPT‑5.3 Instant 75 upvotes, 28 comments
  14. Claude's Cycles [pdf] 294 upvotes, 143 comments
  15. Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns 1323 upvotes, 743 comments
  16. GitHub Is Having Issues 62 upvotes, 24 comments
  17. I'm losing the SEO battle for my own open source project 319 upvotes, 166 comments
  18. Arm's Cortex X925: Reaching Desktop Performance 230 upvotes, 126 comments
  19. Why payment fees matter more than you think 14 upvotes, 3 comments
  20. I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services 640 upvotes, 394 comments
  21. Don't become an engineering manager 189 upvotes, 128 comments
  22. Most-read tech publications have lost over half their Google traffic since 2024 172 upvotes, 118 comments
  23. Tell HN: GitHub Having Issues 37 upvotes, 19 comments
  24. When AI writes the software, who verifies it? 55 upvotes, 33 comments
  25. MacBook Pro with new M5 Pro and M5 Max 472 upvotes, 464 comments
  26. MacBook Air with M5 259 upvotes, 253 comments
  27. The beauty and terror of modding Windows 85 upvotes, 74 comments
  28. Apple Studio Display and Studio Display XDR 150 upvotes, 163 comments
  29. Iran War Cost Tracker 26 upvotes, 20 comments
  30. Pass-Through of Tariffs: Evidence from European Wine Imports 59 upvotes, 63 comments

Last generated 3:30am, 4 March 2026. Source here.
